# cloudfoundry_user (List Resource)

This list resource allows you to discover all users the caller has access to, optionally scoped to an organization or space.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# This feature requires Terraform v1.14.0 or later (Stable as of 2026)
# List resources must be defined in .tfquery.hcl files.

# Generic template for a list block
list "cloudfoundry_user" "<label_name>" {
  # (Required) Provider instance to use
  provider = provider_name

  config {
    # Provider specific filters
  }
}

# List block to discover all users.
list "cloudfoundry_user" "all_users" {
  provider = cloudfoundry
}

# List block to discover all users and include the resource data in the output.
list "cloudfoundry_user" "all_users_with_data" {
  provider         = cloudfoundry
  include_resource = true
}

# List block to discover all users in a specific organization.
list "cloudfoundry_user" "org_users" {
  provider = cloudfoundry
  config {
    org = "b4da43cd-2055-4d4d-ae6e-4066ce34a563"
  }
}

# List block to discover all users in a specific space and include the resource data in the output.
list "cloudfoundry_user" "org_users_with_data" {
  provider         = cloudfoundry
  include_resource = true
  config {
    space = "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `org` (String) The GUID of the organization to filter users by. Returns only users that are members of this organization.
- `space` (String) The GUID of the space to filter users by. Returns only users that are members of this space.
